payload.answer: The new fact appears to restate the existing memory with no substantive difference: both say Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.
citations: Existing memory: "Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans."
New: "Sam from Goldman said he likes Bill Evans."

entity_resolution.reason: No entity ambiguity is apparent beyond the same referent already described in both facts.

evidence.existing_fact: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.
evidence.new_fact: Sam from Goldman said he likes Bill Evans.
evidence.reason: Same subject, same source reference, same preference; only wording differs ("mentioned" vs "said").
